ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_parcels" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the land parcel */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Full address and name of the site */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* The coordinate reference system used for geographic coordinates */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the land parcel */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the land parcel */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Area of the land parcel in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the land parcel */,
  "deliverable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the site is deliverable for development */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current planning status of the land parcel */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when planning permission was granted */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* History of planning applications and decisions */,
  "proposed_for_pip" INTEGER /* Indicates if the site is proposed for a Planning Inspectorate Panel */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings planned */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed development */,
  "non_housing_development" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is non-housing development planned */,
  "part2" TEXT /* Additional planning information */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Range of net dwellings from */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Range of net dwellings to */,
  "hazardous_substances" TEXT /* Information on any hazardous substances on the site */,
  "site_information" TEXT /* Additional information about the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Miscellaneous notes about the site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the land parcel was first added to the database */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the land parcel information was last updated */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organisation responsible for the land parcel */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label of the organisation responsible for the land parcel */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code assigned to the land parcel */,
  "zoning_description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning code */,
  "environmental_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of any environmental assessments conducted */,
  "environmental_concerns" TEXT /* Any known environmental concerns (e.g., flood risk, contaminated soil) */,
  "infrastructure_status" TEXT /* Status of infrastructure (e.g., water, electricity, roads) */,
  "development_start_date" TEXT /* Date when development started */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of project completion */,
  "current_development_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of development (e.g., planning, construction, completed) */,
  "public_accessibility" TEXT /* Indication of public accessibility to the land parcel */,
  "cultural_heritage" TEXT /* Information on any cultural or historical significance */,
  "gis_layer_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the GIS layer associated with the land parcel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_parcels_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was established */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the organization (e.g., registered, unregistered) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the land parcel */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when a decision was made on the application */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Outcome of the planning decision */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the planning permission */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the application */,
  "application_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the planning application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of planning application (e.g., full, outline) */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, approved) */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization submitting the application */,
  "submitter_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the submitter */,
  "application_documents" TEXT /* Links to or descriptions of documents submitted with the application */,
  "public_comment_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the public comment period */,
  "public_comment_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the public comment period */,
  "public_comments" TEXT /* Summary of public comments received */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Summary of environmental impact assessment */,
  "planning_committee_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the planning committee meeting */,
  "planning_committee_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the planning committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)
